name: aeo-custom-blocks/workflow
title: AEO Agentic Workflow
description: An interactive timeline block showcasing the step-by-step pipeline of an agentic automation workflow.

default.title: Social Listening
default.description: Scrapes Reddit, Quora, and targeted publications to detect high-interest topics where search engines lack high-authority answers.

default.title: Agentic Audit & Content Writing
default.description: Deploys deep research agents to compile raw data and generates comprehensive AEO-optimized schema and article layouts.

default.title: REST API Dispatch
default.description: Programmatically pushes fresh content and injected JSON-LD metadata directly into CMS endpoints for indexing.
